record.name: Acme Broadcast Corp
record.notes: Primary contact: J. Doe (j.doe@acme.example.com). Uses MOS v3.2 & legacy playout. Migrating to v4 next quarter.

record.name: Pinnacle Sports Network
record.notes: Uses 24/7 live sports ingestion. Requires < 50ms latency on replay feeds. SLA tier 1.

record.name: Coastal News Network
record.notes: Account expired. Final invoice #INV-2025-0892 outstanding for $1,250.00. Contact: billing@coastalnews.example.com

record.name: Studio Berlin GmbH
record.notes: Multi-studio setup with 12 channels. Requested custom API integration. Contact: H. Müller (h.mueller@studio-berlin.example.de). Preferred language: German for UI.

record.name: Tokyo Digital Broadcasting
record.notes: Uses 8K Uplink & hybrid cloud ingest. Special requirements for timecode sync across JP & US sites.

record.name: Test Account - DO NOT BILL
record.notes: Internal test account. No billing. Used for staging environment validation.
